mapper.sql: SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", s.stage_name AS "stageName", u.name AS "filledByName" FROM construction_log a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id LEFT JOIN sys_account u ON u.id = a.filled_by

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", s.stage_name AS "stageName", qc.name AS "qcUserName", pm.name AS "projectManagerUserName" FROM inspection a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id LEFT JOIN sys_account qc ON qc.id = a.qc_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account pm ON pm.id = a.project_manager_user_id

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", s.stage_name AS "stageName", reporter.name AS "reportedByName", responsible.name AS "responsibleUserName", reviewer.name AS "reviewUserName" FROM issue_ticket a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reporter ON reporter.id = a.reported_by LEFT JOIN sys_account responsible ON responsible.id = a.responsible_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reviewer ON reviewer.id = a.review_user_id

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", applicant.name AS "applicantName", creator.name AS "createdByName" FROM payment_request a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account applicant ON applicant.id = a.applicant_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName" FROM material_arrival a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", fs.stage_name AS "fromStageName", ts.stage_name AS "toStageName", hu.name AS "handoverUserName", ru.name AS "receiverUserName" FROM project_handover a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage fs ON fs.id = a.from_stage_id LEFT JOIN project_stage ts ON ts.id = a.to_stage_id LEFT JOIN sys_account hu ON hu.id = a.handover_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account ru ON ru.id = a.receiver_user_id
mapper.select:
AND (a.handover_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%') OR a.handover_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%'))
AND (a.handover_code LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' OR a.handover_name LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%')
AND a.handover_type = #{params.handoverType} AND a.status = #{params.status}
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC
